atomicity.message: COS landing stages one docs/tracker administrative unit: the approved Claude orchestrator skill plan plus the COS landing bead tracker row; unrelated tracker/source work remains unstaged.

Staged payload contains only .beads/issues.jsonl and plans/claude-orchestrator-skill.md.

conditions.message: The staged payload is exactly the COS plan plus a scoped COS landing tracker row.
evidence: BrightOwl verified git diff --cached --name-status lists only M .beads/issues.jsonl and A plans/claude-orchestrator-skill.md.
BrightOwl verified staged_payload_hash sha256:99ec6ca50c010a36be44de3e35379694daa65e1362331daa35ec6c6120ef179d and git diff --cached --check passed.

conditions.message: The plan preserves real evidence gates and the scope fix removed broad tracker staging instead of waiving it.

ScarletMarsh independently passed this cell in Agent Mail 3162/3164.

conditions.message: No security-sensitive implementation surface is staged, and the plan sets conservative future boundaries.
evidence: BrightOwl verified no install script, hook, workflow, credential, binary, or package artifact path is staged.

BrightOwl verified the plan retains local project .claude/skills only, no global skill install, no binaries, no network/destructive helper script constraints, and user-owned CLAUDE.md conflict behavior.

conditions.message: No runtime/performance-governed code path is staged.
